general.prepay_options: 3 yr min PPP required, transactions where PPP is prohibited are ineligible

owner_occupied_and_2nd_home.note: > $3,000,000 - See Guides for Appraisal & Credit Overlay

notes: Alt Doc (1099, WVOE, Asset Utilization, Bank Statements, P&L w/3 mos Bank Stmts, One Yr Self-Employment, Assets as Blended Income) NOT allowed on Select Non-QM

credit_events.housing_history: 0 x 30 x 24, rent free not allowed

reserves.base: 6 months min, cash-out cannot be utilized
reserves.additional_financed_properties: 2 mos for each addtn'l financed property (based on subject property PITIA)

other_restrictions.declining_markets: > 70% LTV: 5% LTV reduction from program max
other_restrictions.delayed_financing: $1.5M LA: follow program max; > $1.5M LA: 70% max LTV/CLTV
other_restrictions.gift_funds: 100% allowed w/10% LTV reduction from max LTV, no LTV reduction required with min 5% buyer own funds. Gift of Equity not allowed on Select Non-QM
other_restrictions.fthb: Primary Residence and Investment Properties allowed (2nd Homes ineligible), payment shock should not exceed 300%
other_restrictions.financed_property_limits: 20 financed properties including subject; OCMBC exposure $5.0M or 6 properties
other_restrictions.non_occ_coborrower: Investment - Purchase & Refinance: Full Doc and Bank Statement income only, 80% Max LTV, 660 Min FICO, 50% Max DTI, $1.5M Max LA
other_restrictions.impound_waivers: Owner/2nd Home: Allowed if NOT HPML loan; Non-Owner allowed (see rate sheet)
geographic_restrictions: Texas Cash-Out: 80% max LTV (Owner-Occ, per TX 50(a)(6))

Texas SB 17: Prohibits loans when the borrower is a restricted person connected to China, Russia, Iran, or North Korea; US citizens and PRA from these countries are exempt, while NPRA limited to primary residences only
Arizona SB 1082: Prohibits loans when a borrower or any 30% beneficial owner is classified as a foreign adversary nation or agent
TRID (Non-Business Purpose): Row Homes ineligible in Baltimore City, MD
Investment and Non-TRID (Business Purpose): All subject properties in Baltimore City, MD and Philadelphia County, PA are temporarily ineligible
other_restrictions.seasoning: Cash-out: 6 months ownership or since prior Cash-out; < 6 mos seasoning allowed: All borrowers on the original Note at acquisition or prior cash out must be on the current Note & LTV is based off lesser of purchase price + documented improvements, if acquired in the past 6 months, or appraised value

general.dti_50_55_conditions: Full doc, 6 months reserves, 80% max LTV, 660 min FICO, Primary only, Purchase only, $1.5M max LA
general.io_conditions: 640 min FICO, 80% max LTV, Reserves based on IO payment
general.prepay_options: Owner/2nd Home: Allowed if NOT HPML loan; Non-Owner allowed (see rate sheet)
loan_programs: 30-Year Fixed IO (120 mos IO + 240 mos Amortization)
40-Year Fixed IO (120 mos IO + 360 mos Amortization)

itin.income_types: Full Doc & 12 mos Bank Stmt only

citizenship.itin_conditions: 660 min FICO, 85% max LTV, 80% max LTV NOO, 65% max LTV C/O, > 80% LTV $1.0M max LA, $1.5M max LA, Full Doc & 12 mos Bank Stmt only, 0 x 30 x 12
citizenship.daca_conditions: 85% max LTV, 75% max LTV C/O, 0 x 30 x 12

credit_events.bk_ss_fc_dil_ccc_36_months: > 36 months (12 mos seasoning on discharged BK 13 or CCC w/pay history allowed)
credit_events.bk_ss_fc_dil_ccc_24_months: > 24 months - 10% LTV reduction, $3.5M max LA (discharged BK 13 or CCC w/pay history allowed)
credit_events.bk_ss_fc_dil_ccc_12_months: > 12 months - 15% LTV reduction, $3.0M max LA (discharged BK 13 or CCC allowed)
credit_events.housing_1x30x12: 5% LTV reduction; > $2.5M: 10% LTV reduction, $3.5M max LA
credit_events.housing_1x60x12: 10% LTV reduction (must be 0 x 60 in most recent 6); > $2.5M: 15% LTV reduction, $3.0M max LA

all_occupancies.additional_financed_properties: 2 mos for each addtn'l financed property (based on subject property PITIA)

other_restrictions.declining_markets: > 70% LTV: 5% LTV reduction from program max LTV
other_restrictions.delayed_financing: $1.5M LA: follow program max; > $1.5M LA: 70% max LTV/CLTV
other_restrictions.debt_consolidation: Follows R/T Refi LTV w/80% max LTV, Owner Occupied only (5k max cash in hand)
other_restrictions.gift_funds: 100% allowed w/10% LTV reduction from max LTV, no LTV reduction required with min 5% buyer own funds. Gift of Equity not allowed on Select Non-QM
other_restrictions.fthb: Primary Residence and Investment Properties allowed (2nd Homes ineligible), payment shock should not exceed 300%
other_restrictions.non_occ_coborrower: Investment - Purchase & Refinance: Full Doc and Bank Statement income only, 80% Max LTV, 660 Min FICO, 50% Max DTI, $1.5M Max LA
other_restrictions.financed_property_limits: 20 financed properties including subject; OCMBC exposure $5.0M or 6 properties
other_restrictions.temporary_buydowns: 2:1 and 1:0, 30 year fixed, Purchase transactions only, Primary & Second Home eligible, Investment loans ineligible

non_qm_professional.requirement: Borrower must be currently practicing full-time in their profession, copy of active license and/or degree required
non_qm_professional.professional_requirement: Postgraduate degree + 2 years current employment in discipline

geographic_restrictions: Texas Cash-Out: 80% max LTV (Owner-Occ, per TX 50(a)(6))
Texas SB 17: Prohibits loans when the borrower is a restricted person connected to China, Russia, Iran, or North Korea; US citizens and PRA exempt, NPRA limited to primary residences only
Arizona SB 1082: Prohibits loans when a borrower or any 30% beneficial owner is classified as a foreign adversary nation or agent
TRID (Non-Business Purpose): Row Homes ineligible in Baltimore City, MD
Investment and Non-TRID (Business Purpose): All subject properties in Baltimore City, MD and Philadelphia County, PA temporarily ineligible
other_restrictions.seasoning: Cash-out: 6 months ownership or since prior Cash-out; < 6 mos seasoning allowed: All borrowers on the original Note at acquisition or prior cash out must be on the current Note & LTV based off lesser of purchase price + documented improvements, if acquired in past 6 months, or appraised value

standard: 3 tradelines reporting 12 months with activity in last 12 months
2 tradelines reporting for 24 months with activity in last 12 months
1 revolving tradeline reporting for 60 months with activity in last 12 months
1 installment tradeline reporting for 36 months with activity in last 12 months
tradeline_requirements.trid_shortcut: If primary wage earner has 3 credit scores, minimum standard tradeline requirement is met
tradeline_requirements.non_trid_shortcut: If each borrower has 3 credit scores, minimum standard tradeline requirement is met
tradeline_requirements.limited_tradelines: 80% max LTV - Primary and Second Homes, 70% max LTV - Investment; Not available on Select Non-QM

general.prepay_options: 3 yr min PPP required, transactions where PPP is prohibited are ineligible

income_doc.dscr_calc: Gross Income (lower of 1007 estimated market rent or monthly rent from existing lease w/2 mos proof) / PITIA or ITIA

reserves.over_2M_LA: 6 mos, cash-out can be used to satisfy up to 50% of reserve requirement

recently_listed.requirement: Delisted 1 day prior to application date & may not have been listed for sale for > 180 days
recently_listed.value_determination: Lower of lowest listing price w/in 180 days or appraised value

experienced_investor_definition: Borrower(s) with history of owning & managing NOO income-producing investment real estate for at least 1 yr within the last 3 yrs

general.io_conditions: 700 min FICO, $1.5M max, 75% max LTV, 65% max LTV C/O
loan_programs: 30-Year Fixed IO (120 mos IO + 240 mos Amortization)
40-Year Fixed IO (120 mos IO + 360 mos Amortization)

income_doc.dscr_calc: Gross Income (lower of 1007 estimated market rent or monthly rent from existing lease w/2 mos proof) / PITIA or ITIA. If current rents > market rents, lesser of actual rents or 125% of market rents used.

proof_requirements: Purchases only: 12+ mos STR rental history in last 3 yrs required
If < 12 months STR rental history, addtn'l 5% LTV reduction required
Rents documented with 1007/1025 supported by 12 mos history of payments OR AirDNA/Overview Report
str.ltv_adjustments: 5% reduction if < 12 months STR rental history

credit_events.credit_event_ltv_reduction: 5% reduction, 80% max LTV, 70% max LTV C/O

recently_listed.requirement: Delisted 1 day prior to application date & may not have been listed for sale for > 180 days
recently_listed.value_determination: Lower of lowest listing price w/in 180 days or appraised value

inexperienced_investor.reserves: Min 3 mos, cash out cannot be utilized

general.io_conditions: Qualify on IO Payment ALL States, Reserves based on IO Payment, 640 min FICO, 80% max LTV

income_doc.dscr_calc: Gross Income + Asset Utilization / PITIA or ITIA

str.note: No Ratio DSCR ineligible for STR

general.min_fico_note: No FICO required (680+/No FICO tiers in LTV grid)
general.io_conditions: Qualify on IO Payment ALL States, Reserves based on IO Payment

str.note: Foreign National DSCR ineligible for STR

eligible_countries: China (excluding Hong Kong) as permitted by applicable state law
citizenship.tradelines_with_fico: Must meet minimum standard tradeline requirements; Limited tradelines not allowed
citizenship.tradelines_without_fico: 12 month credit rating from an internationally known financial institution in the borrower country of origin

general.occupancy: Non-Owner Occupied, Investment Properties, 1-4 Units only
general.suspended_areas: All subject properties located in Baltimore City, MD (and its neighborhoods) and Philadelphia County, PA are temporarily suspended
general.texas_sb17: Prohibits loans when the borrower is a restricted person connected to China, Russia, Iran, or North Korea; US citizens and PRA exempt, NPRA limited to primary residences only
general.arizona_sb1082: Prohibits loans when a borrower or any 30% beneficial owner is classified as a foreign adversary nation or agent

appraisals.lte_2M_cu_gt_2_5_or_no_score: Enhanced desk review (ARR, CCA or CDA) required, 10% variance allowed

standard: 3 tradelines reporting 12 months with activity in last 12 months
2 tradelines reporting for 24 months with activity in last 12 months
1 revolving tradeline reporting for 60 months with activity in last 12 months
1 installment tradeline reporting for 36 months with activity in last 12 months
tradeline_requirements.3_credit_scores_shortcut: If each borrower has 3 credit scores, minimum tradeline requirement is met (not available for ITINs)
tradeline_requirements.entity_closing: If member with highest percentage of ownership has 3 credit scores, minimum tradeline requirement is met; If all members have equal ownership shares each borrower evaluated individually
tradeline_requirements.thin_credit_note: Borrower's credit scores primarily based on thin credit (authorized user accounts, self-reported accounts, recently opened accounts with limited activity) must still meet one of the standard tradeline requirements
tradeline_requirements.limited_tradelines: Max 70% LTV; Not available on Select DSCR, Sub1 DSCR, No Ratio DSCR, DSCR Fusion and Foreign National DSCR

experienced_investor.definition: Borrower(s) with history of owning & managing NOO income-producing investment real estate for at least 1 yr within the last 3 yrs
experienced_investor.paid_off_tradelines_12_mos: Mortgage tradelines reflected on credit report that have been paid off or sold in the last 12 mos can be used to meet above requirements
experienced_investor.us_domiciled_properties_only: All properties to meet above definitions must be domiciled in the US (Foreign National excluded)

dscr_qualifying_ratio.formula: Gross Income >= PITIA or ITIA, qualify on cash flow of subject property
dscr_qualifying_ratio.fusion_formula: Gross Income + Asset Utilization >= PITIA or ITIA
dscr_qualifying_ratio.gross_income_definition: Lower of estimated market rent from Form 1007 or monthly rent from existing lease with 2 mos proof of receipt
dscr_qualifying_ratio.rents_above_market: If current rents are more than market rents, the lesser of actual rents or 125% of market rents used

io: 30-Year Fixed IO (120 mos IO + 240 mos Amortization)
40-Year Fixed IO (120 mos IO + 360 mos Amortization)

cash_out_restrictions.ltv_determination: LTV is the lower of max LTV based on FICO, loan amount, occupancy and property type or program specific max LTV as applicable

declining_markets: > 70% LTV: Areas designated declining value on the appraisal will take a 5% LTV reduction from program Max LTV
delayed_financing: > $1.5M loan amount, 70% max LTV/CLTV; Vacant/unleased > 3 mos must follow unleased property LTV/CLTV restrictions
financed_property_limits: Unlimited financed properties; OCMBC exposure - $5.0M or 6 properties
gift_funds: 100% allowed with 10% LTV reduction from program Max LTV; No LTV reduction required with min 5% buyer own funds; Gift of Equity not allowed for Select DSCR
prepay_penalty: Eligible for investment properties only where permitted by applicable state law and regulations

seasoning.cash_out: 6 months ownership or since prior Cash-out
seasoning.lt_6_mos: All borrowers on the original Note at acquisition or prior cash-out must be on the current Note and LTV is based off lesser of purchase price + documented improvements, if acquired in the past 6 months, or appraised value

cumulative_adjustments_note: All Adjustments on this matrix are cumulative, all LTV calculations start from the highest LTV allowed per product
